ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., Forward, Defense, Goalie) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft round */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Central, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "general_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's general manager */,
  "head_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's head coach */,
  "assistant_coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_head_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_coach_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_assistant_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_coach_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_general_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("general_manager_id") REFERENCES personnel ("personnel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the statistics are for (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "pim" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes (PIM) by the player */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the player */,
  "power_play_points" INTEGER /* Number of power play points by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Total penalty minutes by the player */,
  "game_winning_goals" INTEGER /* Number of game-winning goals scored by the player */,
  "over_time_goals" INTEGER /* Number of overtime goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_goals" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed goals scored by the player */,
  "short_handed_points" INTEGER /* Number of short-handed points by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins by the player */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses by the player */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots by the player */,
  "takeaways" INTEGER /* Number of takeaways by the player */,
  "giveaways" INTEGER /* Number of giveaways by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "can_view_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view player statistics */,
  "can_edit_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to edit player statistics */,
  "can_manage_players" INTEGER /* Permission to manage player profiles */,
  "can_manage_teams" INTEGER /* Permission to manage team profiles */,
  "can_view_contracts" INTEGER /* Permission to view player contracts */,
  "can_edit_contracts" INTEGER /* Permission to edit player contracts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the agent works for */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the personnel */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., General Manager, Head Coach) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the personnel's role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the personnel's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id")
)
